\tzpentry{ID11420}{Sn Matter Density Scaling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
Matter density distributed through an n-sphere scales inversely with R to the n.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\rho_{m}\sim R^{-n}
